description: Append-only provenance manifest superseding PM-004. Fixes: drift_status enum aligned to canonical schema (stable/drifting/stale/not_assessed), repo invariant validator enums aligned to canonical v8 schema, dirty_path_count measured after all permitted edits. PM-003 and PM-004 are frozen and not modified.

disclosure.note: PM-003 and PM-004 were retroactively edited in prior sessions. PM-003 still identifies itself as the active manifest. PM-004 used an invalid drift_status value 'assessed' which is outside the canonical schema enum. This manifest (PM-005) is the authoritative active manifest.

pnpm_test.notes: 121 passed, 0 failed, 8 skipped (canonical-games). 15 new tests since PM-003 baseline: 9 strategist-contract + 7 question-context-cache - 1 overlap.

strategist_contract_tests.notes: 13 tests: original 4 + 9 new (LLM-only downgrade, mixed evidence, forged refs in fallback, malformed arrays, heuristic preserved, no-throw, duplicate dedup, cross-claim ref)

question_context_cache_tests.notes: 7 tests: stale prompt rejection, matching prompt acceptance, prompt/hash/intent storage, expiry rejection, isCacheValidForPrompt, whitespace/case normalization, legacy-cache rejection (records without promptHash)

pnpm_lint.notes: 0 errors, 17 warnings (baseline). All warnings are pre-existing in untouched files.

route_smoke.notes: July smoke run with VITE_LABS_GOLD_BYPASS. June smoke superseded. hosted_live_proof=false preserved.

ecc_parity.notes: Pinned schema hashes match installed ECC schemas; both validators accept the audit (audit:v8:parity)

repository_invariants.notes: 206/206 repository-specific invariant checks pass (audit:repo:invariants). Enums aligned to canonical v8 schema.

cross_artifact.notes: 18 cross-artifact checks: state-experiments, designed count, metadata refs, execution order, phase9-manifest, route smoke readiness, state-manifest test count, state-manifest lint warnings, timestamp freshness, phase ledger completeness, LTI status consistency, dirty path drift, route artifact date, hypothesis no-promotion, confidence dimensions separated, casebook 5+5 design-only, casebook experiment/hypothesis mapping, casebook targets match source pack

casebook_validation.notes: 10 design-only cases with canonical mapping: EXP-007 education/H-EDU-4, EXP-008 enterprise/H-ENT-0. Negative fixtures pass.

approval_packet_validation.notes: 10 required sections, independent approval boundaries, education institutional-review and privacy controls, 13+ public/reference URLs

v8_regressions.notes: 6 negative regression fixtures pass: invalid drift_status, invalid tool_health, forbidden experiment root field, inconsistent experiment count, execution while validation pending, supported hypothesis without results

recovery_results.evidence_bundle_status: 13 changed to true, 2 correctly remain false (15 total bundles)
recovery_results.dirty_path_count_source: git status --porcelain | wc -l (measured after all PM-005 edits including artifact validator and claims output)
recovery_results.test_delta: 106 → 121 passed (15 new tests: 9 strategist-contract + 7 question-context-cache - 1 overlap)
recovery_results.route_proof_status: artifact_only_not_fresh (cached 7/7 routes, fresh browser run unavailable, hosted_live_proof=false)
recovery_results.validator_enum_alignment: Repo invariant validator enums (current_phase, current_gate, analysis_status, market_validation_status, drift_status) aligned to canonical v8 schema in scripts/validate-audit-v8.mjs
recovery_results.discovery_pack: Unified 5+5 JSON with 10 named targets (5 enterprise + 5 education), 0 real interactions

residual_risks: 17 pre-existing lint warnings in untouched files (baseline)
Discovery pack targets are not buyer proof — zero real interactions
LTI JWKS uses placeholder RSA modulus — not production-verified
StrategyConsole cold import test may timeout in parallel runs (passes in isolation)
